name: shell-mobile-nav
title: ShellMobileNav
description: Full-height mobile primary navigation pane with local Dashboard and Settings browsing.

intent.summary: Full-height mobile primary navigation pane with local Dashboard and Settings browsing.
useWhen: The mobile ShellApp Menu control needs to expose the complete primary navigation collection.
accessibility: The pane is a named navigation landmark and retains visible labels for every destination.
Escape requests dismissal and opening moves focus to the selected or first available area.
states: Dashboard and Settings change only the collection being browsed.
Area, Help, and Account events express intent while the application owns navigation and product behavior.
responsiveBehavior: The pane fills the mobile content stage while the bottom bar remains available.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: dashboardGroups, settingsGroups.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
